subcodes.first_line: O My beloved! Until recently letters would arrive from thee, bringing solace to the hearts of those who yearn for thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حبیب من تا چندی پیش نامه از شما میرسید و مشتاقان را مدار تسلی خاطر بود ولی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @wisdom [hikmat], @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
